[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 0000000 a
3 0000000 a
4 0000000 a
5 0110001 3
6 1000101 3
7 1100011 4

01 10 1110100 4
12 21 0100110 3
23 32 1001101 4
34 43 1101100 4

56 65 1001101 4
67 76 1100011 4 match 7
70 07 1110100 4

35 53 1000101 3 match 6

60 06 0010111 4
71 17 0000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4
